title: Florida Sunshine Law Request: ECPA Valuation Justification For The Escambia County Equestrian Center

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

Dear Records Custodian,

Under the Florida Sunshine Law (Chapter 119, F.S.), I am requesting access to and copies of the administrative and appraisal records used to calculate the 2025 "Land Value" for Parcel ID 171S312101000000 (Situs: 7750 MOBILE HWY 32526).

Specifically, the certified roll data indicates the Land Value for this 151.4041-acre parcel was reduced from $1,513,800 in 2024 to $52,983 in 2025. I am requesting the specific documents that justify and authorize this $1,460,817 reduction.

Please provide:

The 2024 and 2025 internal appraisal worksheets or CAMA (Computer Assisted Mass Appraisal) system notes for this specific parcel.

Any notices of zoning changes, use-code reclassifications, or agricultural/conservation exemptions applied to this land between January 1, 2024, and the present.

Any interagency memorandums, environmental assessments, hazard notifications, or federal/state easement filings received by the Property Appraiser’s office regarding this parcel that negatively impacted the land valuation model.

If you determine that any portion of these requested records is exempt from disclosure under Chapter 119, Florida law requires you to state in writing the basis for the exemption, including the exact statutory citation authorizing the redaction or denial.

Please advise me of any costs associated with fulfilling this request prior to processing.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Matthew Joseph Luecht
